title: A Minecraft Server
description: This modpack includes quality-of-life and vanilla-feeling additions to give a more convenient experience without losing the original game.
body:
## A Minecraft Server
This is my server's modpack, put together for me and my friends to use. It includes quality-of-life and vanilla-feeling additions to give a more convenient experience without losing the original game.

There is technically no need to use this modpack if you do not have access to my server. However, there is nothing stopping you from using it if you enjoy the mods.

## Why did I make this modpack?

I enjoy playing minecraft, especially with friends, but I often become uninterested or bored after a length of time. I put together this modpack as a way for my friends and myself to feel motivated to play the game again by adding little things that make the game feel less difficult to keep playing.

## Installation
To install the modpack simply open the page on the Modrinth app and click the Install button.

### Please read if you have access to the server.
Old versions of this modpack are not compatible with the mods currently on the server. Please play using the latest version to be able to join the server.
